title: Block By Block
description: A silly mod that adds some silly blocks.
body:
# **ABOUT**
**Block By Block** is my first mod. It doesn't require any other mods to work. It's vanilla style, and adds multiple new decorative blocks into Minecraft, to the delight of builders.

Block By Block currently supports 2 languages: **English** and **Polish**.

As of right now I have halted the development of the mod, however i could return to it in the future.

# **ADDITIONS**
1.0
- **Colored Bricks** (all colors, includes stairs, slabs and walls)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cf51fdc0a085c781cc25d93a48b497819311ed3.png)

</details>



- **Chiseled Blocks** (5 new, and 4 retextured)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e62df8492f4f266fae8b6c409f164a7e6627a58.png)

</details>


  
- **Bonus Advancement** 

1.1

- **Packed Ice Bricks**, and **Chiseled Packed Ice Bricks**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76e14d7f4559d6066c8408c5b65e7e3037b0c95c.png)

</details>



- **Soul Sandstone** Block Types (+ 2 retextured sandstone blocks)


<details>

![Sandstone Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69ba3d617f2b797ffe5ec8a6b031cede42976231.png)

# **AUTHOR**  
**TSHA** - That's me, everything in this mod be it code, textures, sounds, is made by myself.
